name: Pennsylvania Dutch Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a kettle. Cover with water and bring to a simmer. Add parsley, bayleaf, poultry seasoning, pepper, celery, carrots, potatoes, and onion. Simmer until the chicken is tender.
2. Remove the chicken from its bones and cut into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large bowl, sift together flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
4. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add eggs, one at a time, whisking continuously to incorporate.
5. Gradually add hot water as needed until a stiff dough forms.
6. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth.
7. Divide the dough into two equal pieces and roll each out until very thin. Cut into 1-inch noodles.
8. Return the chicken to the broth (or use homemade broth) and add noodles one at a time, stirring gently. Continue boiling until the noodles are cooked through, about 5 minutes.
9. Serve with crusty bread and salad.
